titleStmt.title: SII 7.306: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 306. (A.R. No. 117 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE LEFT OF ENTRANCE INTO THE ANANTESVARA TEMPLE AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . namastuṁgasirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailō
kyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)mulastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śakavaruśa 1288 ya
parābhavasaṁvatsarada pusya śu 13 maṁgaḷavāradaṁdu śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāsegetappuvarāyara
gaṁḍa śrīvīrabukaṁṇavoḍeyara nirūpadiṁ śrīmanumahā
pradhānaṁ gōparasavoḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuvalli Uḍu
pina dēvarige nayivēdyanaṁdādīptiya brāṁhmaṇara bhōjanake māḍida dha
(ṁ)¨rmmada śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdaḍe pū¨rvadalu sōvaladēvi
yara bāḷanū viṭhapadaṁṇāyakaru mūlavāgi koṁḍu
va dēvarige pratidina 1 kaṁ nayivēdyada Aki ba 1 naṁdādīvige 2 Uṁba
brāṁhmaṇa ja 16 kaṁ Akki ba 16 mēlu biyaker 1 yi ma¨ryā
deyalu naḍasuvaru sōvaladēvi sva¨rgasteyāda baḷika biya
vivara malliyadaṁṇāyakaru māḍida dha¨r(ṁ)mma
mūḍadēvara nayivēdyake pratidina 1 kaṁ Aki ba 2 Uṁba brāṁhma
ru ja 8 kaṁ Aki ba 8 mēlu biyake r . Aṁtu pratidina 1 kaṁ yibaru
dēvara nayivēdyake Aki ba 4 naṁdādīvige 2 Uṁba brāṁhmaru ja 8 ka
[ṁ Aki ba 8 mēlu] biyake r 1 . yi ma¨ryādeyalu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastā
yiĀgi naḍavadakke biṭa bāḷu paḍuvoṁgadaOḷage niḍu teriya paḍuva ba
ḷiya bāḷu muḍalu tonaseya dēvaru mūliya bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍu
valu teṁkalu haṁnoṁdaṟa modala bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu samudradiṁ muḍalu baḍagalu tonaseya maṁjāḷuvana bāḷi
ṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi catusīmeyoḷaguḷa bāḷu Aḷu teṁginatō
ṭa tonaseyaOḷage mūḍalu dēsiṁgarasana bāḷiṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu
koṭīsaraseṭiya tōṭadiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu cayipahārahi seṭana
bāḷiṁ mūḍalu baḍaga hosaŪra kaḷiyaṁ teṁkalu yi catusīmeOḷaguḷa
bāḷu teṁkalu maṁjāḷuvana muṟulapāṭiya tōṭadiṁ baḍagalu
kāhinakāṭiṁ mūḍalu baḍaga hosabu paruṁḍana tōṭa
teṁkalu yi mūṟu sīme Oḷaguḷa teṁgina tōṭa kiḍeŪralu bi
bāḷuvana Upina Agara muḍalu mēketavana bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu caṁdaladēviya bāḷiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu samudra
daṁ mūḍalu baḍaga biṁmuva¨rttana Aruvorada Agaradiṁ teṁka
yi catusīmeyoḷagaṇa Agara A bāḷu Aṁtu yivuṟu ṭhāvina
catusīmeyoḷaguḷa bāḷu Aḷu nidhinikṣēpajalapāśāṇavanu
sa nālku cerikalada mariyādeyāgi Uḍupina sēnabōva
U [A]gu māḍikoṁḍu naḍasibaharu yī ba
ya kāṭinalu panikuvaru yi dhaṁ¨rmmakke Āru
Obaru tapidaḍe vāraṇāsiyallu sāvira kavileya
nū sāvira brāṁhmaranū vadhisida dōśadali hōharu .
gōparsana barahā .
Digital edition of SII 7.306 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
